module.name: Chat (reference)
module.description: chat.ui: chatsessionmgr (Python) + chatweb (Vue/TS under web/). HTTP server serves POST /api/chat/ui and web/dist; see README.md.

deployment.notes: Install sqlitedb (or postgresdb) and contactbook before chatapp. For UI: npm install && npm run build in web/, point http_server static_root to web/dist. Full COS may use subprocess or thread pool per module; memcos stays in-process.
